Will you be my prom date?

scroll

I hope you want to be my date at the prom (like in those American movies haha). Even if lately not everything went smoothly, I still love you more than anything and I wouldn’t want this event to go by without us having the best time.

I love you the most,

your most annoying boyfriend (and only one I hope 🙄🩷), Alex
